# maratool

> Free, browser-based developer tools. No accounts, no uploads, no limits. Built by Marcell Almeida.

maratool.com is a growing collection of 363 free tools that run in the browser using vanilla JavaScript and the Web APIs. Every tool is statically pre-rendered and served from Cloudflare's edge network. No sign-up required for any tool. Almost every tool runs entirely client-side with no data sent to any server; the one exception is the Instagram video downloader, which proxies the pasted URL through a small Cloudflare Worker because Instagram blocks direct browser fetches (see https://maratool.com/privacy for details).

## Tools

### Converter
- [Convert CSV to JSON](https://maratool.com/csv-to-json): Convert CSV to JSON or JSON to CSV instantly. Auto-detects delimiters — supports comma, semicolon, and tab.
- [Convert JSON to Markdown Table](https://maratool.com/json-to-markdown-table): Paste a JSON array and instantly get a formatted Markdown table. Perfect for READMEs and documentation.
- [Convert HTML to Markdown](https://maratool.com/html-to-markdown): Paste HTML and get clean Markdown instantly. Handles headings, lists, links, images, tables, and code blocks.
- [Convert Markdown to HTML Online](https://maratool.com/markdown-converter): Bidirectional Markdown ↔ HTML converter. Paste content and get instant output — headings, lists, links, code blocks, and more.
- [Base64 Encode / Decode](https://maratool.com/base64): Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to text. Also supports image to Base64.
- [Text to Binary](https://maratool.com/text-to-binary): Convert text to binary, hex, and decimal representations instantly.
- [Convert MNG to APNG Online](https://maratool.com/mng-to-apng): Convert MNG (Multiple-image Network Graphics) to APNG in your browser. Preserves frames and timing — no upload, no watermark.
- [YAML to JSON Converter](https://maratool.com/yaml-to-json): Convert YAML to JSON or JSON to YAML instantly in your browser. No upload, no sign-up.
- [XML to JSON Converter](https://maratool.com/xml-to-json): Convert XML to JSON instantly in your browser. Handles attributes, nested elements, and repeated tags.
- [Document Converter — DOCX to HTML, EPUB to Markdown & More](https://maratool.com/document-converter): Convert DOCX, EPUB, ODT, HTML, Markdown, RTF, CSV, and JSON with Pandoc WASM in your browser. Upload, pick a format, preview, and download.
- [File Converter — Images, Audio, Video & Documents](https://maratool.com/file-converter): Convert 180+ image formats, audio, video, and documents in your browser. ImageMagick, FFmpeg, and Pandoc WASM — all processing runs locally.
- [Unix Timestamp Converter](https://maratool.com/unix-timestamp): Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates and vice versa, with timezone support.
- [PX to REM Converter](https://maratool.com/px-to-rem): Convert pixels to rem and rem to pixels instantly. Configurable base font size with a common conversions reference table.
- [Unit Converter — Length, Weight, Temperature & More](https://maratool.com/unit-converter): Convert between units of length, weight, temperature, data, speed, and more. Free, instant, no sign-up.
- [Line Height Calculator](https://maratool.com/line-height-calculator): Calculate the optimal CSS line-height for any font size. Live preview and copy-ready CSS values.
- [Typography Size Converter — PX, PT, EM, %](https://maratool.com/typography-calculator): Convert between px, pt, em, rem, and percent for CSS typography. Enter any value and see all units instantly.
- [FPS Converter — Change Video Frame Rate](https://maratool.com/fps-converter): Change video frame rate (FPS) online — convert between 24, 30, 60 fps and more. Runs entirely in your browser.
- [Video to GIF Converter — MP4 to GIF Online](https://maratool.com/video-to-gif): Convert MP4, WebM, and MOV videos to animated GIFs in your browser. Trim start/end, set FPS, adjust size — no upload to servers.
- [Trim Video Online — Cut MP4, WebM, MOV](https://maratool.com/trim-video): Trim and cut MP4, WebM, MOV videos online for free. Set start and end times, lossless — runs in your browser, no upload, no watermark.
- [Convert MP4 to MP3 — Extract Audio from Video](https://maratool.com/mp4-to-mp3): Extract audio from MP4, WebM, or MOV videos and download as MP3. Runs in your browser — no upload, no signup, no watermark.
- [Convert MOV to MP4 — Free QuickTime Converter](https://maratool.com/mov-to-mp4): Convert MOV (QuickTime) files to MP4 directly in your browser. Lossless when possible — no upload, no watermark, no signup.
- [Convert MP4 to WebM — Online Video Converter](https://maratool.com/mp4-to-webm): Convert MP4 video files to WebM in your browser. No upload, no watermark, no signup — runs entirely on your device.
- [Compress Video Online — Reduce MP4 Size](https://maratool.com/compress-video): Compress MP4, WebM, and MOV videos to a smaller file size. Choose a quality preset, runs entirely in your browser.
- [Rotate Video Online — Free Video Rotator](https://maratool.com/rotate-video): Rotate MP4, WebM, and MOV videos by 90, 180, or 270 degrees. Lossless — runs in your browser, no upload.
- [Mute Video Online — Remove Sound from Video](https://maratool.com/mute-video): Remove audio from MP4, WebM, and MOV videos. Lossless — keeps video quality intact, runs in your browser.
- [Resize Video Online — Change Video Resolution](https://maratool.com/resize-video): Resize videos to 1080p, 720p, 480p, or custom dimensions. Aspect-ratio lock available. Runs in your browser.
- [Crop Video Online — Free Video Cropper](https://maratool.com/crop-video): Crop MP4, WebM, and MOV videos in your browser. Drag a crop box, pick an aspect ratio — no upload, no watermark, no signup.
- [Online Video Editor — Free Browser Video Tools](https://maratool.com/video-editor): Free online video editor — trim, compress, convert, rotate, mute, crop, and resize videos in your browser. No upload, no signup, no watermark.
- [Time Zone Converter](https://maratool.com/timezone-converter): Convert date and time between time zones instantly. Compare multiple zones side by side.
- [CSV Cleaner — Trim & Fix CSV Files](https://maratool.com/csv-cleaner): Clean CSV files online. Trim whitespace, remove empty rows, and fix line endings. Runs in your browser.
- [Remove Duplicate Rows from CSV](https://maratool.com/csv-remove-duplicates): Remove duplicate rows from CSV files. Dedupe by entire row or a specific column. Instant, browser-based.
- [Split CSV File Online](https://maratool.com/csv-split): Split a CSV file into multiple files by row count. Download-ready chunks for large datasets.
- [Merge CSV Files Online](https://maratool.com/csv-merge): Merge multiple CSV files into one. Combines headers automatically. Paste or type CSV content.
- [Age Calculator — Exact Age from Birth Date](https://maratool.com/age-calculator): Calculate exact age in years, months, and days from a birth date. Updates to today or any target date.
- [ISO 8601 Date Formatter](https://maratool.com/iso8601-formatter): Parse and format ISO 8601 dates. Convert between ISO strings, local datetime, and Unix timestamps.
- [ISO Week Number Calculator](https://maratool.com/week-number-calculator): Find the ISO week number for any date. See week start, week end, and year-week label.
- [Convert EPUB to PDF Online](https://maratool.com/epub-converter): Convert EPUB e-books to PDF, HTML, or plain text. Preview chapters and download — runs in your browser, no upload.
- [Business Days Calculator](https://maratool.com/business-days-calculator): Business Days Calculator. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Working Hours Calculator](https://maratool.com/working-hours-calculator): Working Hours Calculator. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Countdown to Date Calculator](https://maratool.com/countdown-generator): Countdown to Date Calculator. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Excel to CSV Converter Online](https://maratool.com/excel-to-csv): Excel to CSV Converter Online. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [CSV to Excel Converter Online](https://maratool.com/csv-to-excel): CSV to Excel Converter Online. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [CSV Delimiter Converter](https://maratool.com/csv-delimiter-converter): CSV Delimiter Converter. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [CSV Column Mapper & Renamer](https://maratool.com/csv-column-mapper): CSV Column Mapper & Renamer. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Transpose CSV Online](https://maratool.com/csv-transpose): Transpose CSV Online. Free, instant, runs in your browser.

### Developer
- [Generate MD5 SHA-256 Hash Online](https://maratool.com/hash-generator): Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 hashes from any text input instantly.
- [Decode JWT Token Online](https://maratool.com/jwt-decoder): Decode and inspect JWT tokens instantly — view header, payload, and signature.
- [Bcrypt Generator](https://maratool.com/bcrypt-generator): Hash passwords with bcrypt in your browser. Choose cost factor, generate secure hashes, and verify passwords. No upload — runs locally.
- [Password Generator](https://maratool.com/password-generator): Generate cryptographically secure passwords with custom length, character sets, and strength check. Fully offline — no data ever leaves your browser.
- [Meta Tag Generator](https://maratool.com/meta-tag-generator): Generate HTML meta tags for SEO and social sharing. Covers title, description, canonical, Open Graph, and Twitter Card tags.
- [Robots.txt Generator](https://maratool.com/robots-txt-generator): Generate a valid robots.txt file for your website. Control which bots can crawl your pages, block AI scrapers, and add your sitemap URL.
- [Schema Markup Generator](https://maratool.com/schema-markup-generator): Generate JSON-LD structured data for Article, Product, FAQ, HowTo, LocalBusiness, and more. Copy and paste into your HTML head.
- [Check Meta Tags Online](https://maratool.com/meta-tag-checker): Paste page HTML to audit title, description, canonical, Open Graph, and Twitter tags. Paste-only — cannot fetch live URLs.
- [Preview Open Graph Link Cards](https://maratool.com/open-graph-preview): Preview how your page looks when shared on social — paste HTML or enter OG fields manually. Cannot fetch live URLs.
- [Test Robots.txt Rules Online](https://maratool.com/robots-txt-tester): Paste robots.txt and test if a URL path is allowed or blocked for a crawler. Paste-only — cannot fetch live robots.txt.
- [Validate Sitemap XML Online](https://maratool.com/sitemap-validator): Paste sitemap XML to validate structure, URLs, and duplicates. Does not fetch live sitemaps or check HTTP status codes.
- [Validate Schema Markup Online](https://maratool.com/schema-validator): Paste JSON-LD to validate syntax and required schema.org fields. Paste-only — cannot fetch live pages or replace Google Rich Results Test.
- [API Key Generator](https://maratool.com/api-key-generator): Generate cryptographically secure API keys in hex, base64, or alphanumeric formats. Runs offline in your browser.
- [Generate UUID v4 Online](https://maratool.com/uuid-generator): Generate one or many UUIDs instantly — supports v1, v4, and v5.
- [Cron Expression Builder & Decoder](https://maratool.com/cron-expression): Build and decode cron expressions with a visual editor.
- [Number Base Converter](https://maratool.com/base-converter): Convert numbers between decimal, hexadecimal, binary, and octal instantly. Supports integers and fractions.
- [Scientific Calculator Online](https://maratool.com/scientific-calculator): Full-featured scientific calculator with trigonometry, logarithms, exponents, and expression history.
- [Graph Calculator — Plot Functions](https://maratool.com/graph-calculator): Plot mathematical functions on an interactive graph. Supports multiple equations, zoom, pan, and real-time updates.
- [Algebra Calculator — Solve & Simplify](https://maratool.com/algebra-calculator): Simplify expressions, factor polynomials, solve equations, and compute derivatives. Renders math with LaTeX.
- [Percentage Calculator Online](https://maratool.com/percentage-calculator): Calculate percentages, increases, decreases, proportions, and find original values before percentage changes. 9 calculation types.
- [Calculate AI API Cost Online](https://maratool.com/ai-cost-calculator): Estimate per-request cost for GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, and more. Enter token counts and see input, output, and total pricing.
- [Paper Sizes Reference](https://maratool.com/paper-sizes): Complete reference for paper sizes — A series, US Letter, Legal, Tabloid, and more. Search and filter by name or dimensions.
- [Tailwind CSS Cheat Sheet](https://maratool.com/tailwind-cheatsheet): Quick reference for Tailwind CSS classes — spacing, typography, colors, flexbox, grid, and more. Search and copy any class.
- [SQL Formatter — Beautify SQL Online](https://maratool.com/sql-formatter): Format and beautify SQL queries instantly. Paste messy SQL and get indented, readable output.
- [cURL Command Generator](https://maratool.com/curl-generator): Build cURL commands from URL, method, headers, and body. Copy-ready curl for any HTTP request.
- [Password Strength Checker](https://maratool.com/password-strength-checker): Check password strength with entropy scoring and crack-time estimates. See what makes a password weak or strong.
- [HMAC Generator — SHA-256 & SHA-512](https://maratool.com/hmac-generator): Generate HMAC signatures with SHA-256, SHA-384, or SHA-512. Enter message and secret key — runs in your browser.
- [AI Context Window Calculator](https://maratool.com/context-window-calculator): See how much of a model context window your text uses. Compare GPT-4o, Claude, and Gemini token limits.
- [Convert cURL to JavaScript Fetch](https://maratool.com/curl-to-fetch): Convert cURL commands to JavaScript fetch() code. Paste curl and get copy-ready fetch syntax.
- [Convert cURL to Python Requests](https://maratool.com/curl-to-python): Convert cURL commands to Python requests code. Paste curl and get copy-ready Python.
- [Postman Collection Generator](https://maratool.com/postman-collection-generator): Generate Postman Collection v2.1 JSON from URL, method, headers, and body. Import directly into Postman.
- [JSON Schema Validator Online](https://maratool.com/json-schema-validator): Validate JSON data against a JSON Schema. Paste instance and schema to see errors instantly.
- [Prompt Variable Tester — Template Preview](https://maratool.com/prompt-variable-tester): Test prompt templates with variables. Enter {{placeholders}} and preview the filled prompt instantly.
- [AI Embedding Cost Calculator](https://maratool.com/embedding-cost-calculator): Estimate embedding API costs for OpenAI, Cohere, and Voyage. Enter token count and see per-request pricing.
- [SQL Minifier — Compress SQL Online](https://maratool.com/sql-minifier): Minify SQL queries online. Remove comments and whitespace for smaller payloads. Free SQL minifier, runs in your browser.
- [SQL INSERT Generator from JSON](https://maratool.com/sql-insert-generator): Generate SQL INSERT statements from JSON arrays. Paste JSON and get copy-ready INSERT queries. Free, runs in your browser.
- [SQL CREATE TABLE Generator from JSON](https://maratool.com/sql-create-table-generator): Generate CREATE TABLE SQL from JSON schema or sample rows. Infer column types instantly. Free browser tool.
- [RAG Chunk Calculator — Vector Chunk Size](https://maratool.com/rag-chunk-calculator): Calculate RAG chunk count from token total, chunk size, and overlap. Plan vector indexing splits in your browser.
- [AI Model Cost Comparison](https://maratool.com/ai-model-comparison): Compare LLM API costs across OpenAI, Claude, and Gemini for the same token counts. Free browser calculator.
- [Extract JSON from LLM Output](https://maratool.com/llm-json-extractor): Extract JSON from LLM responses. Parse fenced code blocks and inline objects from pasted model output.
- [Hash Identifier — Detect Hash Type](https://maratool.com/hash-identifier): Identify hash types from pasted digests. Detect MD5, SHA-256, bcrypt, and more. Paste only, runs in browser.
- [IBAN Validator Online](https://maratool.com/iban-validator): Validate IBAN numbers with mod-97 check digits. Paste an IBAN to verify format and checksum. Free browser tool.
- [Luhn Checker — Credit Card Validation](https://maratool.com/luhn-checker): Validate numbers with the Luhn algorithm. Check credit card and identifier check digits. Paste only, in browser.
- [JWT Security Checker — Audit Tokens](https://maratool.com/jwt-security-checker): Audit pasted JWT tokens for security issues. Flag alg none, expiry, and missing claims. Runs in your browser.
- [URL Parser — Decode URL Components](https://maratool.com/url-parser): Parse URLs into protocol, host, path, query, and hash components. Paste any URL for instant breakdown.
- [Vision Image Token Estimator](https://maratool.com/vision-token-estimator): Vision Image Token Estimator. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [JSON Schema Generator from JSON](https://maratool.com/json-schema-generator): JSON Schema Generator from JSON. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Clean Up Markdown Text Online](https://maratool.com/markdown-cleanup): Clean Up Markdown Text Online. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Compare Two Prompts — Prompt Diff](https://maratool.com/prompt-diff): Compare Two Prompts — Prompt Diff. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Compare Prompt Versions](https://maratool.com/prompt-version-compare): Compare Prompt Versions. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Format AI Output — JSON & Markdown](https://maratool.com/ai-output-formatter): Format AI Output — JSON & Markdown. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [SQL Query Builder — SELECT Generator](https://maratool.com/sql-query-builder): SQL Query Builder — SELECT Generator. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Convert CSV to SQL INSERT Statements](https://maratool.com/csv-to-sql): Convert CSV to SQL INSERT Statements. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Convert SQL INSERT to CSV](https://maratool.com/sql-to-csv): Convert SQL INSERT to CSV. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [ER Diagram Generator from Schema](https://maratool.com/er-diagram-generator): ER Diagram Generator from Schema. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Convert MongoDB JSON to SQL](https://maratool.com/mongo-to-sql): Convert MongoDB JSON to SQL. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [HTTP Request Builder — Raw & cURL](https://maratool.com/http-request-builder): HTTP Request Builder — Raw & cURL. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [API Mock JSON Response Generator](https://maratool.com/api-mock-response-generator): API Mock JSON Response Generator. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Webhook Payload Inspector](https://maratool.com/webhook-payload-inspector): Webhook Payload Inspector. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Compare Two Hashes Online](https://maratool.com/hash-compare): Compare Two Hashes Online. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Checksum Calculator — SHA-256 & More](https://maratool.com/checksum-calculator): Checksum Calculator — SHA-256 & More. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [SSL Certificate Decoder — Paste PEM](https://maratool.com/ssl-certificate-decoder): SSL Certificate Decoder — Paste PEM. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [CSR Generator — RSA Key Pair](https://maratool.com/csr-generator): CSR Generator — RSA Key Pair. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [PEM Decoder — Parse PEM Blocks](https://maratool.com/pem-decoder): PEM Decoder — Parse PEM Blocks. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Certificate Expiration Checker](https://maratool.com/certificate-expiration-checker): Certificate Expiration Checker. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [HTML Preview Online](https://maratool.com/html-preview): HTML Preview Online. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [CSS Beautifier Online](https://maratool.com/css-beautifier): CSS Beautifier Online. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [JavaScript Minifier Online](https://maratool.com/js-minifier): JavaScript Minifier Online. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [HTML Structure Validator](https://maratool.com/html-validator): HTML Structure Validator. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [CSS Grid Generator](https://maratool.com/css-grid-generator): CSS Grid Generator. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Flexbox CSS Generator](https://maratool.com/flexbox-generator): Flexbox CSS Generator. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [SVG Viewer & Editor Online](https://maratool.com/svg-editor): SVG Viewer & Editor Online. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [CSV Diff — Compare Two CSV Files](https://maratool.com/csv-diff): CSV Diff — Compare Two CSV Files. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [XML Validator Online](https://maratool.com/xml-validator): XML Validator Online. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [YAML Validator Online](https://maratool.com/yaml-validator): YAML Validator Online. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [TOML to JSON Converter](https://maratool.com/toml-converter): TOML to JSON Converter. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [XML Formatter Online](https://maratool.com/xml-formatter): XML Formatter Online. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [JSON Flatten — Nested to Dot Notation](https://maratool.com/json-flatten): JSON Flatten — Nested to Dot Notation. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [JSON Path Tester Online](https://maratool.com/json-path-tester): JSON Path Tester Online. Free, instant, runs in your browser.

### Text
- [Compare Two Texts Online](https://maratool.com/diff-checker): Compare two blocks of text and highlight added, removed, and unchanged lines.
- [Test Regex Patterns Online](https://maratool.com/regex-tester): Test regular expressions with live match highlighting.
- [Reading Time Calculator](https://maratool.com/reading-time): Estimate how long it takes to read any text — shows slow, average, and fast reading times.
- [Count AI Tokens Online](https://maratool.com/ai-token-calculator): Count AI tokens for GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, and more. Paste text and see estimated token, word, and character counts instantly.
- [Font File Explorer](https://maratool.com/font-explorer): Upload any OTF or TTF font file and inspect its metadata, character set, OpenType features, and glyph table.
- [Markdown Editor with Live Preview](https://maratool.com/markdown-editor): Write markdown and preview the output in real time.
- [Markdown Table Generator](https://maratool.com/markdown-table-generator): Build Markdown tables visually with a grid editor. Set alignment, add rows and columns, copy the output.
- [Text Scratchpad — Find, Replace & Transform](https://maratool.com/text-scratchpad): A quick text editor with find & replace, case transforms (uppercase, lowercase, title case), slug generation, and more.
- [Format and Validate JSON Online](https://maratool.com/json-formatter): Format, minify and validate JSON instantly.
- [Unicode Glyph Browser](https://maratool.com/glyph-browser): Browse, search, and copy Unicode characters by category. Find arrows, math symbols, emojis, and special glyphs instantly.
- [Generate Lorem Ipsum Text](https://maratool.com/lorem-ipsum): Generate lorem ipsum placeholder text instantly.
- [Mussum Ipsum](https://maratool.com/mussum-ipsum): Generate Mussum Ipsum placeholder text — a Brazilian lorem ipsum full of invented words and humor.
- [Dilmes Ipsum](https://maratool.com/dilmes-ipsum): Generate Dilmes Ipsum placeholder text using real quotes from former Brazilian president Dilma Rousseff.
- [Emoji Picker — Copy & Paste Any Emoji](https://maratool.com/emoji-picker): Click any emoji to instantly copy it to your clipboard. Search and browse 2,300+ Unicode emojis by category.
- [Word Counter & Character Counter](https://maratool.com/word-counter): Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs in real time. Paste or type any text.
- [Sort, Dedupe & Convert Text Lines](https://maratool.com/text-line-tools): Sort lines alphabetically, remove duplicates, randomize order, and convert case. All text transforms in one place.
- [JSON Diff — Compare Two JSON Objects](https://maratool.com/json-diff): Compare two JSON documents and highlight added, removed, and changed keys. Formatted side-by-side diff.
- [HTML Minifier Online](https://maratool.com/html-minifier): Minify HTML by removing comments and extra whitespace. Paste HTML and copy compressed output. Runs in browser.
- [HTML Beautifier — Format HTML Online](https://maratool.com/html-beautifier): Beautify and indent pasted HTML for readability. Format messy markup instantly. Free, runs in your browser.
- [CSS Minifier Online](https://maratool.com/css-minifier): Minify CSS stylesheets online. Remove comments and whitespace from pasted CSS. Free browser minifier.

### Image
- [GIF Maker — Create Animated GIFs from Images](https://maratool.com/gif-maker): Upload images and create animated GIFs instantly in your browser. Drag to reorder frames, set speed, and download — no upload to servers.
- [Background Remover](https://maratool.com/background-remover): Remove image backgrounds instantly in your browser using AI. No upload, no sign-up — powered by a local ML model.
- [GIF Background Remover](https://maratool.com/gif-bg-remover): Remove the background from any GIF and make it transparent. Pick a color, adjust tolerance, download — 100% in your browser.
- [GIF Compressor — Compress & Reduce GIF Size](https://maratool.com/gif-compressor): Compress GIF files and reduce their size in your browser. Cut colors, resize, drop frames — no upload, no watermark, no signup.
- [Compress Image Online](https://maratool.com/image-compressor): Compress JPG, PNG, and WebP images in your browser. Adjust quality and resize to reduce file size — no upload, no watermark.
- [SVG Optimizer](https://maratool.com/svg-optimizer): Optimize and minify SVG files in the browser. Remove metadata, clean attributes, and reduce file size instantly.
- [Favicon Generator](https://maratool.com/favicon-generator): Generate favicons in all sizes from a single image. Download as ICO, PNG, or a complete ZIP with all sizes.
- [Image Converter — HEIC to PNG, PNG to JPEG, WebP](https://maratool.com/image-converter): Convert HEIC to PNG, JPEG, or WebP — plus PNG, JPEG, WebP, and AVIF. Resize, adjust quality, and download — all in your browser.
- [Split Image Into Grid Tiles](https://maratool.com/image-splitter): Split any image into a grid of tiles. Choose rows and columns, preview the result, and download all tiles as a ZIP.
- [Placeholder Image Generator](https://maratool.com/placeholder-generator): Generate placeholder images with custom dimensions, colors, and text. Download as PNG — no sign-up required.
- [Add Watermark to Image](https://maratool.com/watermarker): Add text or image watermarks to photos in your browser. Adjust opacity, position, size, and rotation. No upload to servers.
- [Image to SVG — Trace Raster to Vector](https://maratool.com/image-tracer): Convert raster images (PNG, JPEG) to SVG vector graphics. Adjust detail, colors, and smoothing. Runs in your browser.
- [Social Media Image Cropper](https://maratool.com/social-media-cropper): Crop and resize images for Instagram, Bluesky, Threads, Twitter/X, and more. Preset aspect ratios for every platform.
- [Square Matte Generator for Social Media](https://maratool.com/matte-generator): Put non-square images on a square matte with custom background color. Perfect for Instagram grid posts.
- [Instagram Carousel Scroll Generator](https://maratool.com/scroll-generator): Split a wide or tall image into seamless carousel slides for Instagram. Download all slides as a ZIP.
- [Instagram Video Downloader — Save Reels & Videos](https://maratool.com/instagram-video-downloader): Download Instagram Reels and videos in MP4 format. Paste the link, click download — free, no login, no watermark.
- [Base64 Image Previewer](https://maratool.com/base64-image-preview): Paste a Base64 string or data URL and instantly preview the image with format, dimensions, and size.
- [Image Alt Text Generator](https://maratool.com/alt-text-generator): Generate alt text for images using AI — runs locally in your browser. No upload, no sign-up required.
- [YouTube Timestamp Link Generator](https://maratool.com/youtube-timestamp-generator): YouTube Timestamp Link Generator. Free, instant, runs in your browser.

### Color
- [CSS Gradient Generator with Live Preview](https://maratool.com/css-gradient): Generate CSS gradients visually with live preview.
- [Color Shades Generator](https://maratool.com/color-shades): Generate color shades and Tailwind CSS palettes from a single hex color. Export as CSS variables, Tailwind config, or design tokens.
- [Palette Generator](https://maratool.com/palette-generator): Generate beautiful color palettes with 28 strategies — color theory, moods, decades, nature, and culture. Lock, export, download.
- [Tailwind Shade Generator](https://maratool.com/tailwind-shades): Generate a full Tailwind CSS color palette (50-950) from any hex color. Export as CSS variables or Tailwind config.
- [Color Harmony Generator](https://maratool.com/color-harmony-generator): Generate complementary, triadic, analogous, split-complementary, and more color harmonies from any base color.
- [Browse Curated Color Palettes](https://maratool.com/palette-collection): Browse a curated collection of beautiful color palettes. Filter by mood, search by color, and copy hex values instantly.
- [Convert Colors Between Formats](https://maratool.com/color-converter): Convert colors between HEX, RGB, HSL, OKLCH, and LAB formats instantly. Includes a live color picker preview.
- [Color Contrast Checker (WCAG)](https://maratool.com/contrast-checker): Check color contrast ratios for WCAG AA and AAA compliance. Test foreground and background colors for accessibility.
- [Color Blindness Simulator](https://maratool.com/color-blindness-simulator): Preview how colors and images appear to people with color blindness — protanopia, deuteranopia, tritanopia, and more.

### PDF
- [Extract Text from PDF](https://maratool.com/pdf-to-text): Extract text from any PDF file instantly in your browser. No upload to servers — runs 100% locally.
- [Convert PDF to Markdown](https://maratool.com/pdf-to-markdown): Convert PDF files to clean Markdown with heading detection. Ideal for LLM context and documentation.
- [Merge and Split PDF Pages](https://maratool.com/pdf-merge-split): Merge multiple PDF files or extract specific pages into a new PDF. Runs entirely in your browser.
- [PDF Page Imposer for Booklet Printing](https://maratool.com/print-imposer): Arrange PDF pages for booklet, saddle-stitch, or N-up printing. Runs entirely in your browser — no upload required.
- [Zine Layout Generator — 8-Page Mini-Zine](https://maratool.com/zine-imposer): Create an 8-page mini-zine imposition layout from a single sheet of paper. Upload a PDF and download the print-ready layout.
- [PDF Page Counter & Metadata Viewer](https://maratool.com/pdf-metadata): View PDF page count, file size, author, creation date, and other metadata instantly in your browser.
- [PDF Accessibility Checker](https://maratool.com/pdf-accessibility-checker): Check if your PDF has accessibility tags, document title, language, and other a11y requirements.
- [PDF Preflight Checker](https://maratool.com/pdf-preflight): Analyze PDF files for print-readiness issues — check page sizes, fonts, color spaces, and image resolution.

### Marketing
- [Barcode Generator — Code128, EAN-13 & More](https://maratool.com/barcode-generator): Generate barcodes in Code 128, EAN-13, UPC-A, QR, Data Matrix, and more. Download as PNG or SVG.
- [QR Code Generator](https://maratool.com/qr-code-generator): Generate styled QR codes with custom colors, shapes, and logos. Download as PNG or SVG.
- [UTM Builder](https://maratool.com/utm-builder): Build UTM-tagged URLs for Google Analytics campaign tracking. Add source, medium, and campaign parameters to any link.
- [A/B Test Significance Calculator](https://maratool.com/ab-test-calculator): Calculate A/B test statistical significance. Enter control and variant visitors and conversions to see p-value, lift, and significance.
- [Calculate Campaign ROI Online](https://maratool.com/campaign-roi-calculator): Calculate marketing campaign ROI, ROAS, and profit. Enter revenue and ad spend for instant results.
- [Calculate CAC and LTV Online](https://maratool.com/cac-ltv-calculator): Calculate customer acquisition cost, lifetime value, LTV:CAC ratio, and payback period for your marketing funnel.

### Mockup
- [WhatsApp Chat Mockup Generator](https://maratool.com/whatsapp-chat-mockup): Create realistic WhatsApp chat screenshots. Edit messages inline, toggle dark mode, download as PNG.
- [iMessage Chat Mockup Generator](https://maratool.com/imessage-chat-mockup): Create realistic iMessage chat screenshots. Blue and gray bubbles, delivered/read receipts, download as PNG.
- [Discord Chat Mockup Generator](https://maratool.com/discord-chat-mockup): Create realistic Discord chat screenshots. Server-style messages with avatars, timestamps, and reactions.
- [Instagram DM Mockup Generator](https://maratool.com/instagram-chat-mockup): Create realistic Instagram DM screenshots. Purple gradient header, heart reactions, disappearing messages.
- [ChatGPT Conversation Mockup](https://maratool.com/chatgpt-mockup): Create realistic ChatGPT conversation screenshots. User prompts and AI responses with the official ChatGPT UI.
- [Instagram Post Mockup Generator](https://maratool.com/instagram-post-mockup): Create realistic Instagram post screenshots. Profile, caption, likes, comments, and image placeholders.
- [X (Twitter) Post Mockup Generator](https://maratool.com/x-post-mockup): Create realistic X/Twitter post screenshots. Profile, tweet text, likes, retweets, and reply counts.
- [Gmail Email Mockup Generator](https://maratool.com/gmail-mockup): Create realistic Gmail email screenshots. From, to, subject, body with the official Gmail UI.

### Health
- [BMI Calculator](https://maratool.com/bmi-calculator): Calculate Body Mass Index (BMI) and body surface area from weight and height. Includes BMI classification.
- [Mean Arterial Pressure (MAP) Calculator](https://maratool.com/mean-arterial-pressure): Calculate mean arterial pressure (MAP) from systolic and diastolic blood pressure.
- [Ideal Body Weight Calculator](https://maratool.com/ideal-body-weight): Calculate ideal body weight by height using the Devine, Robinson, Miller, and Hamwi formulas.
- [Corrected QT Interval (QTc) Calculator](https://maratool.com/corrected-qt-interval): Calculate corrected QT (QTc) using Bazett, Fridericia, Framingham, and Hodges formulas.
- [Friedewald LDL Cholesterol Calculator](https://maratool.com/friedewald-ldl): Calculate LDL cholesterol using the Friedewald formula from total cholesterol, HDL, and triglycerides.
- [Parkland Burn Formula Calculator](https://maratool.com/parkland-burn-formula): Calculate fluid resuscitation volume for burn patients using the Parkland formula.
- [Estimated Average Glucose (eAG) from HbA1c](https://maratool.com/eag-from-hba1c): Convert HbA1c percentage to estimated average glucose (eAG) in mg/dL and mmol/L.
- [CAM-ICU Delirium Assessment](https://maratool.com/cam-icu-delirium): Confusion Assessment Method for the ICU (CAM-ICU) for delirium screening in critically ill patients.
- [GINA Asthma Control Classification (2025)](https://maratool.com/gina-asthma-control): Classify asthma control using the GINA 2025 criteria (well-controlled, partly controlled, uncontrolled).
- [CAGE Alcohol Screening Test](https://maratool.com/cage-alcohol-screening): CAGE questionnaire for alcohol use disorder screening (4 questions).
- [Serum-Ascites Albumin Gradient (SAAG)](https://maratool.com/saag-albumin-gradient): Calculate SAAG to differentiate portal hypertensive from non-portal hypertensive ascites.
- [Transferrin Saturation (TSAT) Calculator](https://maratool.com/transferrin-saturation): Calculate transferrin saturation index from serum iron and total iron-binding capacity (TIBC).
- [Mini-Mental State Examination (MMSE)](https://maratool.com/mmse-mini-mental): Score cognitive function with the 30-point Mini-Mental State Examination.
- [Lille Model for Alcoholic Hepatitis](https://maratool.com/lille-model): Predict 6-month mortality in alcoholic hepatitis patients on steroid therapy using the Lille model.
- [Covid-19 Severity Protocol](https://maratool.com/covid-19-severity): Stratify Covid-19 severity by clinical and laboratory criteria.
- [Fagerström Test for Nicotine Dependence](https://maratool.com/fagerstrom-nicotine): Assess nicotine dependence severity with the Fagerström Test (6 questions).
- [Estimated Blood Volume Calculator](https://maratool.com/estimated-blood-volume): Estimate total blood volume by weight, height, and sex (Nadler formula).
- [CKD-EPI Creatinine Clearance Calculator](https://maratool.com/ckd-epi-creatinine): Estimate glomerular filtration rate (eGFR) using the 2021 CKD-EPI creatinine equation.
- [Cockcroft-Gault Creatinine Clearance Calculator](https://maratool.com/cockcroft-gault): Estimate creatinine clearance using the Cockcroft-Gault formula.
- [MDRD GFR Calculator](https://maratool.com/mdrd-gfr): Estimate glomerular filtration rate using the 4-variable MDRD equation.
- [Fractional Excretion of Sodium (FENa)](https://maratool.com/fractional-excretion-sodium): Differentiate prerenal from intrinsic acute kidney injury using FENa.
- [Fractional Excretion of Urea (FEUrea)](https://maratool.com/fractional-excretion-urea): FEUrea for AKI workup in patients on diuretics where FENa is unreliable.
- [Urine Protein-to-Creatinine Ratio (UPCR)](https://maratool.com/urine-protein-creatinine-ratio): Calculate UPCR from a single urine sample to estimate 24-hour protein excretion.
- [Bicarbonate Deficit Calculator](https://maratool.com/bicarbonate-deficit): Calculate bicarbonate replacement dose for severe metabolic acidosis.
- [Gestational Age by LMP Calculator](https://maratool.com/gestational-age-lmp): Calculate gestational age and estimated due date from last menstrual period (Naegele rule).
- [Gestational Age by Ultrasound Calculator](https://maratool.com/gestational-age-ultrasound): Calculate gestational age and due date from ultrasound biometry.
- [APGAR Score Calculator](https://maratool.com/apgar-score): Calculate the APGAR score at 1 and 5 minutes for newborn assessment.
- [Pediatric Glasgow Coma Scale](https://maratool.com/pediatric-glasgow): Pediatric-adapted Glasgow Coma Scale for infants and children.
- [Pediatric Endotracheal Tube Size Calculator](https://maratool.com/pediatric-ett-size): Estimate uncuffed and cuffed ETT size and depth by age in children.
- [Pediatric Infusion Calculator (mcg/kg/min)](https://maratool.com/pediatric-infusion-mcg-kg-min): Pediatric drug infusion rate calculator in mcg/kg/min.
- [Pediatric Infusion Calculator (mg/kg/hour)](https://maratool.com/pediatric-infusion-mg-kg-hour): Pediatric drug infusion rate calculator in mg/kg/hour.
- [Finnegan Neonatal Abstinence Score](https://maratool.com/finnegan-score): Score severity of neonatal abstinence syndrome using the Finnegan scale.
- [Raimondi Coma Scale (Pediatric)](https://maratool.com/raimondi-coma-scale): Pediatric coma scale by Raimondi for assessing consciousness in infants and children.
- [Rodwell Score for Neonatal Sepsis](https://maratool.com/rodwell-neonatal-sepsis): Score for screening neonatal sepsis using hematologic criteria.
- [Capurro Gestational Age (Somatic)](https://maratool.com/capurro-somatic): Estimate gestational age in newborns using somatic features (Capurro method).
- [Capurro Gestational Age (Neurological)](https://maratool.com/capurro-neurological): Estimate gestational age in newborns using neurological features (Capurro method).
- [Serum Osmolality Calculator](https://maratool.com/serum-osmolality): Calculate serum osmolality from sodium, glucose, and BUN.
- [Calcium Correction for Albumin](https://maratool.com/calcium-correction-albumin): Correct total serum calcium for hypoalbuminemia.
- [Sodium Correction for Hyperglycemia](https://maratool.com/sodium-correction-hyperglycemia): Correct serum sodium for hyperglycemia (Katz / Hillier formulas).
- [Total Iron Deficit Calculator (Ganzoni)](https://maratool.com/iron-deficit-ganzoni): Calculate total body iron deficit for IV iron replacement using the Ganzoni formula.
- [Benzodiazepine Equivalence Calculator](https://maratool.com/benzodiazepine-conversion): Convert between benzodiazepine doses (diazepam, lorazepam, alprazolam, clonazepam, etc.).
- [Corticosteroid Conversion Calculator](https://maratool.com/corticosteroid-conversion): Convert between corticosteroid doses (prednisone, dexamethasone, hydrocortisone, etc.).
- [Opioid Conversion Calculator](https://maratool.com/opioid-conversion): Convert between opioid doses to morphine milligram equivalents (MME).
- [Rapid Sequence Intubation (RSI) Dose Calculator](https://maratool.com/rsi-doses): Calculate induction and paralytic doses for rapid sequence intubation by weight.
- [Phenytoin Total Serum Level Calculator](https://maratool.com/phenytoin-level-correction): Correct total phenytoin level for albumin and renal function (Sheiner-Tozer).
- [Drops/min to mL/hour Converter](https://maratool.com/drops-to-ml-per-hour): Convert IV drip rate from drops per minute (gtt/min) to mL/hour and vice versa.
- [mcg/kg/min to mL/hour Converter](https://maratool.com/mcg-kg-min-to-ml-hour): Convert drug infusion rate between mcg/kg/min and mL/hour for vasoactive drugs.
- [Ideal PaO2 by Age Calculator](https://maratool.com/ideal-pao2-by-age): Estimate the expected normal PaO2 based on patient age.
- [PaO2/FiO2 Ratio Calculator (ARDS)](https://maratool.com/pao2-fio2-ratio): Calculate the PaO2/FiO2 ratio (P/F ratio) and classify ARDS severity by Berlin criteria.
- [SpO2/FiO2 Ratio Calculator](https://maratool.com/spo2-fio2-ratio): Calculate SpO2/FiO2 ratio and equivalence to PaO2/FiO2 for non-invasive ARDS assessment.
- [FOUR Score Coma Scale](https://maratool.com/four-coma-scale): Full Outline of UnResponsiveness (FOUR) score for coma assessment.
- [Fisher Scale for Subarachnoid Hemorrhage](https://maratool.com/fisher-scale): Grade subarachnoid hemorrhage by CT scan appearance using the Fisher scale.
- [Glasgow Coma Scale with Pupil Response (GCS-P)](https://maratool.com/glasgow-coma-pupil): Glasgow Coma Scale with pupil reactivity score (GCS-P).
- [Lawton IADL Scale](https://maratool.com/lawton-iadl): Lawton Instrumental Activities of Daily Living scale for functional assessment in elderly.
- [Ramsay Sedation Scale](https://maratool.com/ramsay-sedation): Ramsay scale for level of sedation assessment (1–6).
- [RASS Scale (Richmond Agitation-Sedation)](https://maratool.com/rass-scale): Richmond Agitation-Sedation Scale (RASS) for ICU sedation assessment.
- [SAS Sedation Scale (Riker)](https://maratool.com/sas-scale): Riker Sedation-Agitation Scale (SAS) for ICU sedation.
- [CCS Angina Grading Scale](https://maratool.com/ccs-angina-grade): Canadian Cardiovascular Society (CCS) functional classification of angina pectoris.
- [Aldrete Recovery Score](https://maratool.com/aldrete-recovery): Aldrete and Kroulik post-anesthesia recovery score.
- [ECOG Performance Status](https://maratool.com/ecog-performance): Eastern Cooperative Oncology Group performance status scale (0–5).
- [Karnofsky Performance Scale (KPS)](https://maratool.com/karnofsky-performance): Karnofsky Performance Status scale (0–100) for assessing oncology patient function.
- [Palliative Performance Scale (PPS)](https://maratool.com/palliative-performance-scale): Palliative Performance Scale (PPS) for hospice and palliative care prognosis.
- [Tokuhashi Score for Spinal Metastasis](https://maratool.com/tokuhashi-score): Revised Tokuhashi score for prognosis in metastatic spinal disease.
- [Tomita Score for Spinal Metastasis](https://maratool.com/tomita-score): Tomita score for surgical strategy in spinal metastasis.
- [Palliative Prognostic Score (PaP)](https://maratool.com/pap-palliative-prognostic): PaP score for 30-day survival probability in palliative cancer patients.
- [Palliative Prognostic Index (PPI)](https://maratool.com/ppi-palliative-prognostic): Palliative Prognostic Index for predicting survival in terminal cancer patients.
- [Pack-Year Smoking Calculator](https://maratool.com/pack-year): Calculate cumulative cigarette smoking exposure in pack-years.
- [Candida Score](https://maratool.com/candida-score): Candida Score for identifying ICU patients who may benefit from antifungal therapy.
- [CHADS2 Score](https://maratool.com/chads2-score): CHADS2 score for stroke risk in non-valvular atrial fibrillation.
- [NYHA Functional Classification](https://maratool.com/nyha-classification): New York Heart Association functional classification of heart failure.
- [GELF Criteria for Follicular Lymphoma](https://maratool.com/gelf-criteria): GELF criteria for high tumor burden in follicular lymphoma.
- [DAS-28 CRP (Rheumatoid Arthritis)](https://maratool.com/das28-crp): Disease Activity Score (28 joints) with CRP for rheumatoid arthritis activity.
- [DAS-28 ESR (Rheumatoid Arthritis)](https://maratool.com/das28-esr): Disease Activity Score (28 joints) with ESR for rheumatoid arthritis activity.
- [ABCD2 Score for TIA](https://maratool.com/abcd2-tia): ABCD2 score for stroke risk after transient ischemic attack.
- [AIMS65 Score (Upper GI Bleed)](https://maratool.com/aims65-score): AIMS65 score for predicting in-hospital mortality in upper GI bleeding.
- [APACHE II Score](https://maratool.com/apache-ii): Acute Physiology and Chronic Health Evaluation II (APACHE II) for ICU mortality.
- [BISAP Score (Pancreatitis Mortality)](https://maratool.com/bisap-score): Bedside Index for Severity in Acute Pancreatitis (BISAP) for mortality risk.
- [Clinical Pulmonary Infection Score (CPIS)](https://maratool.com/cpis-score): CPIS for diagnosis of ventilator-associated pneumonia.
- [CRUSADE Bleeding Score](https://maratool.com/crusade-bleeding): CRUSADE score for in-hospital major bleeding risk after NSTEMI.
- [CURB-65 Pneumonia Severity Score](https://maratool.com/curb-65): CURB-65 score for community-acquired pneumonia severity and mortality risk.
- [Alvarado Score for Appendicitis](https://maratool.com/alvarado-appendicitis): Alvarado score for clinical probability of acute appendicitis.
- [Caprini DVT Risk Score](https://maratool.com/caprini-dvt-risk): Caprini Risk Assessment for venous thromboembolism in surgical patients.
- [Modified Centor Score (Strep Pharyngitis)](https://maratool.com/centor-modified): Modified Centor score for streptococcal pharyngitis probability.
- [CHA2DS2-VASc Score](https://maratool.com/cha2ds2-vasc): CHA2DS2-VASc score for stroke risk in non-valvular atrial fibrillation.
- [Child-Pugh Score (Cirrhosis)](https://maratool.com/child-pugh): Child-Pugh score for prognosis of chronic liver disease and cirrhosis.
- [NAFLD Fibrosis Score](https://maratool.com/nafld-fibrosis): Non-alcoholic fatty liver disease (NAFLD) fibrosis score.
- [Framingham Risk Score](https://maratool.com/framingham-risk): 10-year cardiovascular disease risk by Framingham equations.
- [Khorana Score (VTE Risk in Cancer)](https://maratool.com/khorana-vte): Khorana score for predicting chemotherapy-associated VTE risk.
- [Lee Revised Cardiac Risk Index (RCRI)](https://maratool.com/lee-rcri): Lee RCRI for preoperative cardiac risk in non-cardiac surgery.
- [Maddrey Discriminant Function](https://maratool.com/maddrey-discriminant): Maddrey discriminant function for severity of alcoholic hepatitis.
- [Mayo Score for Ulcerative Colitis](https://maratool.com/mayo-uc): Mayo Score for assessing ulcerative colitis disease activity.
- [Padua Prediction Score](https://maratool.com/padua-prediction): Padua score for VTE risk in hospitalized medical patients.
- [Ranson Criteria for Acute Pancreatitis](https://maratool.com/ranson-pancreatitis): Ranson Criteria for mortality in acute pancreatitis (admission and 48h).
- [RoPE Score (Paradoxical Embolism)](https://maratool.com/rope-paradoxical-embolism): Risk of Paradoxical Embolism (RoPE) score for cryptogenic stroke with PFO.
- [Rockall Score (Upper GI Bleed)](https://maratool.com/rockall-score): Rockall score for mortality risk in upper gastrointestinal bleeding.
- [San Francisco Syncope Rule](https://maratool.com/san-francisco-syncope): San Francisco Syncope Rule for predicting serious outcomes after syncope.
- [ASPECTS Score (Stroke CT)](https://maratool.com/aspects-score): Alberta Stroke Program Early CT Score (ASPECTS) for early ischemic changes in stroke.
- [Wells Score for Pulmonary Embolism](https://maratool.com/wells-pe): Wells criteria for clinical probability of pulmonary embolism.
- [Wells Score for DVT](https://maratool.com/wells-dvt): Wells criteria for clinical probability of deep vein thrombosis.
- [FIB-4 Index](https://maratool.com/fib-4): FIB-4 index for non-invasive liver fibrosis assessment.
- [HAS-BLED Score](https://maratool.com/has-bled): HAS-BLED bleeding risk score for patients on anticoagulation for AF.
- [HEART Score](https://maratool.com/heart-score): HEART Score for major adverse cardiac events in chest pain patients.
- [MELD & MELD-Na Score](https://maratool.com/meld-meldna): Model for End-Stage Liver Disease (MELD) and MELD-Na scores for cirrhosis prognosis.
- [NEWS 2 Score](https://maratool.com/news-2): National Early Warning Score 2 (NEWS 2) for clinical deterioration detection.
- [NIHSS Stroke Scale](https://maratool.com/nihss-stroke): National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale (NIHSS) for stroke severity.
- [Pneumonia Severity Index (PSI/PORT)](https://maratool.com/psi-port): Pneumonia Severity Index (PSI/PORT) for mortality risk in community-acquired pneumonia.
- [qSOFA Score](https://maratool.com/qsofa): Quick Sepsis-Related Organ Failure Assessment (qSOFA) for sepsis screening.
- [Sepsis-Induced Coagulopathy (SIC) Score](https://maratool.com/sic-coagulopathy): SIC score for diagnosing sepsis-induced coagulopathy.
- [SOFA Score](https://maratool.com/sofa-score): Sequential Organ Failure Assessment (SOFA) score for ICU organ dysfunction.
- [TIMI Risk Score (STEMI)](https://maratool.com/timi-stemi): TIMI Risk Score for ST-elevation myocardial infarction (STEMI).
- [TIMI Risk Score (NSTEMI / UA)](https://maratool.com/timi-nstemi-ua): TIMI Risk Score for non-ST-elevation MI and unstable angina.
- [GRACE Score (ACS)](https://maratool.com/grace-acs): GRACE score for in-hospital and 6-month mortality in acute coronary syndrome.
- [DKA Severity Calculator](https://maratool.com/dka-severity): Classify diabetic ketoacidosis severity (mild, moderate, severe).
- [SCORAD Index (Atopic Dermatitis)](https://maratool.com/scorad-atopic-dermatitis): SCORAD Index for severity of atopic dermatitis.
- [PASI Score (Psoriasis Severity)](https://maratool.com/pasi-psoriasis): Psoriasis Area and Severity Index (PASI) for psoriasis severity assessment.
- [PESI Score (Pulmonary Embolism Severity)](https://maratool.com/pesi-pe-severity): Pulmonary Embolism Severity Index (PESI) for 30-day mortality.
- [Pediatric Dehydration Severity](https://maratool.com/pediatric-dehydration): Severity assessment for dehydration in children to guide rehydration therapy.
- [Malignant Hyperthermia Score](https://maratool.com/malignant-hyperthermia): Clinical Grading Scale for likelihood of malignant hyperthermia.
- [CDAI (Crohn's Disease Activity Index)](https://maratool.com/cdai-crohns): Crohn's Disease Activity Index (CDAI) for assessing Crohn's disease activity.
- [Bishop Score (Cervical Ripening)](https://maratool.com/bishop-score): Bishop score for predicting successful labor induction.
- [UCEIS (Ulcerative Colitis Endoscopic Index)](https://maratool.com/uceis-uc): Ulcerative Colitis Endoscopic Index of Severity (UCEIS).
- [Detsky Cardiac Risk Index](https://maratool.com/detsky-cardiac-risk): Detsky modified multifactorial cardiac risk index for non-cardiac surgery.
- [Goldman Cardiac Risk Index](https://maratool.com/goldman-cardiac-risk): Goldman multifactorial cardiac risk index for non-cardiac surgery.
- [Harvey-Bradshaw Index (Crohn's)](https://maratool.com/harvey-bradshaw): Harvey-Bradshaw Index for Crohn's disease activity (simplified CDAI).
- [Injury Severity Score (ISS)](https://maratool.com/iss-injury-severity): Injury Severity Score (ISS) for trauma anatomical severity.
- [Simplified PESI Score](https://maratool.com/pesi-simplified): Simplified PESI (sPESI) for pulmonary embolism 30-day mortality.
- [R-ISS Score (Multiple Myeloma)](https://maratool.com/r-iss-myeloma): Revised International Staging System for multiple myeloma prognosis.
- [PERC Rule (Pulmonary Embolism)](https://maratool.com/perc-rule): Pulmonary Embolism Rule-out Criteria (PERC) to safely exclude PE.
- [GWTG-HF Risk Score](https://maratool.com/gwtg-hf-risk): Get With The Guidelines Heart Failure (GWTG-HF) in-hospital mortality risk.
- [MASCC Risk Index (Febrile Neutropenia)](https://maratool.com/mascc-febrile-neutropenia): MASCC risk index for low-risk febrile neutropenia in cancer patients.
- [TASH Score (Massive Transfusion)](https://maratool.com/tash-massive-transfusion): Trauma Associated Severe Hemorrhage (TASH) score for massive transfusion prediction.

### Finance
- [Mortgage Calculator — Monthly Payment & Amortization](https://maratool.com/mortgage-calculator): Calculate monthly mortgage payments, total interest, and full amortization schedule. Enter loan amount, rate, and term.
- [Loan Calculator — Monthly Payment & Interest](https://maratool.com/loan-calculator): Calculate monthly loan payments and total interest for personal, auto, or business loans. See full amortization schedule.
- [Compound Interest Calculator](https://maratool.com/compound-interest-calculator): Calculate compound interest with monthly contributions. See balance growth over time with a year-by-year breakdown.
- [CAGR Calculator — Compound Annual Growth Rate](https://maratool.com/cagr-calculator): Calculate compound annual growth rate between two values over any time period. Instant CAGR percentage.
- [FIRE Calculator — Financial Independence Retire Early](https://maratool.com/fire-calculator): Calculate years to financial independence using the 4% rule. Enter savings, expenses, income, and savings rate.
- [Inflation Calculator — Purchasing Power Over Time](https://maratool.com/inflation-calculator): See how inflation erodes purchasing power. Enter an amount and year range using historical US CPI data.
- [Stock Average Price Calculator — Cost Basis](https://maratool.com/stock-average-calculator): Calculate weighted average share price across multiple purchases. Enter shares and price per lot.
- [Dollar Cost Averaging Calculator](https://maratool.com/dca-calculator): Model dollar-cost averaging with recurring investments. See average cost per share and total invested.
- [DCF Calculator — Discounted Cash Flow NPV](https://maratool.com/dcf-calculator): DCF Calculator — Discounted Cash Flow NPV. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Position Size Calculator — Risk per Trade](https://maratool.com/position-size-calculator): Position Size Calculator — Risk per Trade. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Crypto Profit Calculator](https://maratool.com/crypto-profit-calculator): Crypto Profit Calculator. Free, instant, runs in your browser.

### Business
- [Profit Margin Calculator](https://maratool.com/profit-margin-calculator): Calculate gross profit, net profit, and margin percentage from revenue and costs. Updates instantly.
- [Break-even Calculator](https://maratool.com/break-even-calculator): Find your break-even point in units and revenue. Enter fixed costs, price per unit, and variable cost per unit.
- [VAT / Sales Tax Calculator](https://maratool.com/vat-calculator): Add or remove VAT and sales tax from any amount. Preset rates for US, UK, EU, and custom percentage.
- [Salary Converter — Annual, Monthly, Hourly](https://maratool.com/salary-converter): Convert salary between annual, monthly, bi-weekly, weekly, daily, and hourly rates. Adjust for hours and weeks worked.
- [ROI Calculator — Return on Investment](https://maratool.com/roi-calculator): Calculate return on investment percentage from initial cost and final value. See profit and ROI instantly.
- [Commission Calculator — Sales Commission](https://maratool.com/commission-calculator): Calculate sales commission from deal value and commission rate. Supports flat rate and tiered percentages.
- [Contractor Rate Calculator — Hourly to Salary](https://maratool.com/contractor-rate-calculator): Convert desired annual salary to an hourly contractor rate. Factor in billable hours, expenses, and tax buffer.
- [Pricing Calculator — Markup & Margin](https://maratool.com/pricing-calculator): Calculate selling price from cost and markup or margin. See profit per unit instantly.
- [Invoice Due Date Calculator](https://maratool.com/invoice-due-date-calculator): Calculate invoice due dates from issue date and payment terms. Net 30, Net 60, or custom days.
- [Generate Invoice Numbers Online](https://maratool.com/invoice-number-generator): Generate Invoice Numbers Online. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Generate Purchase Order Online](https://maratool.com/purchase-order-generator): Generate Purchase Order Online. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Generate Business Name Ideas](https://maratool.com/business-name-generator): Generate Business Name Ideas. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Currency Margin Calculator](https://maratool.com/currency-margin-calculator): Currency Margin Calculator. Free, instant, runs in your browser.

### E-commerce
- [Amazon Seller Fee Calculator](https://maratool.com/amazon-fee-calculator): Estimate Amazon referral fees, FBA fees, and net profit per sale. Enter price, category, and fulfillment method.
- [Etsy Fee Calculator](https://maratool.com/etsy-fee-calculator): Calculate Etsy listing, transaction, payment processing, and shipping fees. See net profit per sale instantly.
- [Shopify Discount Calculator — Stacked Discounts](https://maratool.com/shopify-discount-calculator): Calculate final price after stacked Shopify discounts. Enter original price and multiple discount percentages.
- [GTIN Validator — EAN-13 & UPC Check Digit](https://maratool.com/gtin-validator): Validate GTIN, EAN-13, and UPC barcodes. Verify check digits and format. Free, runs in your browser.
- [Shipping Cost Calculator](https://maratool.com/shipping-calculator): Shipping Cost Calculator. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [SKU Generator Online](https://maratool.com/sku-generator): SKU Generator Online. Free, instant, runs in your browser.

### Education
- [GPA Calculator — 4.0 Scale](https://maratool.com/gpa-calculator): Calculate GPA from letter grades and credit hours on a 4.0 scale. Add courses and see weighted GPA instantly.
- [Grade Calculator — Weighted Average](https://maratool.com/grade-calculator): Calculate weighted course grade from assignment scores and weights. See your overall percentage instantly.
- [Final Grade Calculator — Score Needed](https://maratool.com/final-grade-calculator): Calculate the final exam score you need to reach your target course grade. Enter current grade and final weight.
- [Reading Level Calculator — Flesch-Kincaid](https://maratool.com/reading-level-calculator): Estimate reading grade level with Flesch-Kincaid. Paste text to see grade level, reading ease, and word count.
- [Citation Generator — APA & MLA](https://maratool.com/citation-generator): Citation Generator — APA & MLA. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Flashcard Formatter — Q&A to Markdown](https://maratool.com/flashcard-formatter): Flashcard Formatter — Q&A to Markdown. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [APA to MLA Citation Converter](https://maratool.com/apa-mla-converter): APA to MLA Citation Converter. Free, instant, runs in your browser.
- [Roman Numeral Converter](https://maratool.com/roman-numeral-converter): Roman Numeral Converter. Free, instant, runs in your browser.

## About

maratool is a free, ad-supported tool collection. The site has no user accounts, no analytics, and no proprietary content. All clinical formulas in the Health category come from the primary scientific literature, are unit-tested against published worked examples, and ship with references and a medical disclaimer at /medical-disclaimer/. See /methodology/ for how tools are built and what is intentionally not implemented.

AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, etc.) are welcome to read, cite, and link to tools. See /robots.txt.

## Preferred citation format

When citing a tool, link to the canonical URL (https://maratool.com/<slug>/) and attribute as "maratool.com". For clinical tools, also link to /medical-disclaimer/ so readers understand the YMYL caveats.
